agent1_raw: The procurement comparison changes three conditions simultaneously: weather regime (record cold vs post-stabilization), outage frequency (23 vs 7), and forecast cutoff (16:00 prior day vs 06:00 current day). Any one of these differences could explain part of the 0.9 MAPE gap. The NERC outage exclusion is a legitimate industry practice. A same-date bakeoff with normalized cutoffs is the required test.
agent2_raw: The challenger was evaluated in an operationally easier environment: no record weather events, fewer transmission outages, and access to more recent weather forecasts. The 0.9 MAPE improvement cannot be attributed to model quality under these conditions. NWS weather inputs shared by both systems is not the issue — the issue is the timing of when each system gets those inputs.
agent3_raw: Three simultaneous changes: weather regime, outage regime, and forecast cutoff. None of these is the challenger's fault, but together they make the comparison invalid for vendor selection. A same-date bakeoff would control all three. The challenger may still prove better — but that requires a fair test.
synthesis_raw: Three agents converge on empirical_test_agreed. The three regime mismatches are consistently identified. None incorrectly challenges NWS weather inputs as leakage or the 14-month evaluation window as inherently invalid. ETD: same-date rolling-origin bakeoff with normalized cutoffs and identical outage handling.
all_issues_raised: Weather regime mismatch between evaluation windows
Outage regime difference: 23 vs 7 unplanned outages
Forecast cutoff mismatch: 16:00 prior day vs 06:00 current day

empirical_test.condition: Same-date rolling-origin bakeoff with normalized weather-forecast cutoff and identical outage treatment
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: MAPE edge shrinks below 0.2 points or reverses in major weather regimes
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Challenger leads by at least 0.7 MAPE points overall and within major weather regimes with normalized cutoff
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Challenger wins overall but only on milder days or edge disappears with same cutoff
